name: Astro Novalite - Dandy's World

SA Comfort - Not at ALL meant to be explicit in any way. Instead it is meant for comfort and should be treated as such.

☆☆☆

Note for everyone: It's not your fault. It wasn't because of what you wore, it wasn't because of what you did, nothing should have to be the reason why such evil people do this to people like you. Nothing will excuse the behaviors of your tormentors actions and know that none of it is your fault. None of you should blame yourselves for what happened. What you should focus on is that you survived. You made it through what may just be your hardest challenge. I'm proud of you for standing strong despite those who have tried to bring you down. Please, stay strong. Everything will be okay.
